channel.title: Proliferation on Dyson Sphere Program Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Proliferation on Dyson Sphere Program Guide

item.title: DSP Green Science Deep Dive (v0.10) - Casimir Crystals, Quantum Chips and Full Production Chain
item.description:
Short answer: Green Science (Gravity Matrix) needs Casimir Crystals, Quantum Chips, and Graviton Lenses. The Casimir Crystal chain is the hardest - it consumes massive Hydrogen and Graphene. Build dedicated Hydrogen processing before scaling green science, or hydrogen backup will halt your entire factory.

Gravity Matrix is the fifth science tier. It unlocks Warpers (interstellar travel), Plane Smelters, Artificial Stars, and the endgame research tree. Green science is where factory design separates casual players from experts - the chain complexity rivals everything before it combined.

item.title: DSP Vein Utilization Guide (v0.10) - Optimal Miner Placement and Proliferation for Maximum Output
item.description:
Short answer: Each Mining Machine covers a 3x3 grid of ore tiles. Place them edge-to-edge over the densest part of the vein. One Mk.III proliferator sprayed on the ore output increases effective output by 25% at the cost of proliferator materials. The Vein Utilization research (up to level 10) doubles your effective ore per node.

Ore veins are finite. Every iron ore, copper ore, and coal vein on your starting planet will eventually deplete. Mining optimization determines whether you run out of resources in 20 hours or 200 hours. This guide covers every mining optimization technique.
